basic_details.job_title: CHESS DRDO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Paid Internship Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for High Energy Systems and Sciences DRDO (CHESS DRDO)
basic_details.short_information: Centre for High Energy Systems and Sciences DRDO (CHESS DRDO) has published the Paid Internship Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 20 Paid Internship positions. Candidates within the age limit of up to 27 years and pursuing final year Graduate/Post Graduate in Engineering/Science with at least 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA are eligible to apply offline through the official website, www.drdo.gov.in. The application process is ongoing, and candidates must submit their applications before the last date 11 May 2026, with access to the notification PDF and application details provided be

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing final year Graduate / Post Graduate in Engineering / Science
qualification.details: Pursuing final year full-time B.Tech/B.E./B.Sc./M.Tech/M.Sc. in Physics/Applied Optics from AICTE/UGC recognized University/Institute with >=75% marks or >=7.5 CGPA. Pursuing final year full-time B.Tech/B.E./B.Sc./M.Tech/M.Sc. in Mechanical Engineering from AICTE/UGC recognized University/Institute with >=75% marks or >=7.5 CGPA. Pursuing final year full-time B.Tech/B.E./B.Sc./M.Tech/M.Sc. in Electronics/Instrumentation/Electrical/ECE from AICTE/UGC recognized University/Institute with >=75% marks or >=7.5 CGPA. Pursuing final year full-time B.Tech/B.E./B.Sc./M.Tech/M.Sc. in Computer Science from AICTE/UGC recognized University/Institute with >=75% marks or >=7.5 CGPA. Pursuing final year full-time B.Tech/B.E./B.Sc./M.Tech/M.Sc. in Chemical Engineering from AICTE/UGC recognized University/Institute with >=75% marks or >=7.5 CGPA.

salary_details.details: 5,000/- Per Month Stipend of total Rs. 30,000/- in two installments (Rs.15,000 after completion of 3 months and Rs. 15000 after completion of 6 months) subject to attendance of minimum 15 days in a month.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic merit (>=75% or 7.5 CGPA) Recommendation / referral letter from Principal / Director / HOD
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CHESS DRDO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.drdo.gov.in/drdo/careers.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CHESS DRDO Paid Internship Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the CHESS DRDO Paid Internship Trainee recruitment is 11-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Paid Internship Trainee?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for the Paid Internship Trainee position at Centre for High Energy Systems and Sciences DRDO (CHESS DRDO).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must be pursuing their final year of a full-time Graduate or Post Graduate degree in Engineering or Science from a recognized Indian university with at least 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Paid Internship Trainee position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 27 years. There is no mention of minimum age criteria in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend offered for this internship?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5,000/- per month during the internship period.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the CHESS DRDO Paid Internship Trainee role?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and send it along with required documents to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for this Paid Internship Trainee position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the internship?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic merit (>=75% or 7.5 CGPA) and a recommendation/referral letter from their Principal, Director, or HOD.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CHESS DRDO located?
faq.answer: CHESS DRDO is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500069.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the internship?
faq.answer: The internship training is scheduled to start on 03-06-2026. The exact duration of the internship is not specified in the provided data, but it is a contractual position.
